translations.en: When comes the Help of Allah, and Victory,
translations.ms: Apabila datang pertolongan Allah dan kemenangan (semasa engkau wahai Muhammad berjaya menguasai negeri Makkah)

ayahs.arabic: وَرَأَيْتَ ٱلنَّاسَ يَدْخُلُونَ فِى دِينِ ٱللَّهِ أَفْوَاجًا

translations.en: And thou dost see the people enter Allah's Religion in crowds,
translations.ms: Dan engkau melihat manusia masuk dalam ugama Allah beramai-ramai
translations.id: وَرَأَيۡتَ ٱلنَّاسَ يَدۡخُلُونَ فِي دِينِ ٱللَّهِ أَفۡوَاجٗا

ayahs.transliteration: Waraayta alnnasa yadkhuloona fee deeni Allahi afwajan

ayahs.arabic: فَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ وَٱسْتَغْفِرْهُ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ تَوَّابًۢا

translations.en: Celebrate the praises of thy Lord, and pray for His Forgiveness: For He is Oft-Returning (in Grace and Mercy).
translations.ms: Maka ucapkanlah tasbih dengan memuji Tuhanmu dan mintalah ampun kepadaNya, sesungguhnya Dia amat menerima taubat
translations.id: فَسَبِّحۡ بِحَمۡدِ رَبِّكَ وَٱسۡتَغۡفِرۡهُۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ تَوَّابَۢا

ayahs.transliteration: Fasabbih bihamdi rabbika waistaghfirhu innahu kana tawwaban
